semantic.role: Integration test suite for ArchSpine CLI commands using vitest, spawning the built CLI and mocking user prompts.
responsibilities: Provide the `runCli` helper that spawns the built CLI with arguments and captures stdout, stderr, and exit code.
Set up ephemeral temporary working directories per test to isolate file system side effects.
Mock the `prompts` module by writing a wrapper script allowing automated input injection.
Execute comprehensive end-to-end tests covering CLI commands (init, generate, configuration) via `describe` and `it` blocks.
Integrate with `git` commands through `execFileSync` to validate scaffolding and commit workflows.
Clean up temporary directories using `afterEach` to prevent disk pollution.
outOfScope: Unit testing of internal modules or utilities.
Cross-platform compatibility testing beyond the test environment.
invariants: The test file must follow the naming convention `<name>.test.ts` or `<name>.spec.ts` (rule: test-file-suffix).
Temporary directories must be created and cleaned up deterministically.
CLI tests must target the built CLI binary at `dist/cli/index.js`.
All test cases must use vitest life cycle hooks for proper isolation.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Validate CLI command behavior end-to-end to ensure correctness of scaffolding, prompting, and git integration before releases.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added 37 E2E tests across 7 files for CLI commands (init, generate, config), covering spawned processes, user input simulation, and file system assertions.

English.role: Integration test suite for ArchSpine CLI commands using vitest, spawning the built CLI and mocking user prompts.
responsibilities: Provide the `runCli` helper that spawns the built CLI with arguments and captures stdout, stderr, and exit code.
Set up ephemeral temporary working directories per test to isolate file system side effects.
Mock the `prompts` module by writing a wrapper script allowing automated input injection.
Execute comprehensive end-to-end tests covering CLI commands (init, generate, configuration) via `describe` and `it` blocks.
Integrate with `git` commands through `execFileSync` to validate scaffolding and commit workflows.
Clean up temporary directories using `afterEach` to prevent disk pollution.
outOfScope: Unit testing of internal modules or utilities.

Simplified Chinese.role: 使用 vitest 的 ArchSpine CLI 命令集成测试套件，启动编译后的 CLI 并模拟用户提示。
responsibilities: 提供 `runCli` 辅助函数，用于启动编译后的 CLI 并捕获标准输出、标准错误和退出码。
在每个测试中设置临时工作目录，以隔离文件系统副作用。
通过编写包装脚本模拟 `prompts` 模块，实现自动输入注入。
通过 `describe` 和 `it` 块执行覆盖 CLI 命令（init、generate、配置）的全面端到端测试。
通过 `execFileSync` 集成 git 命令，验证脚手架和提交工作流。
使用 `afterEach` 清理临时目录，避免磁盘污染。
outOfScope: 内部模块或工具函数的单元测试。
超出此测试环境的跨平台兼容性测试。
